source: orthogonal collision of two random Wikipedia draws

stimulus_shape.target: the novelty reserve (protention) — signal-derived vs constant

source: two constructed novelty regimes (deterministic) — the canonical positively-autocorrelated (burst/drought) vs anti-correlated (spaced-newcomer) streams

seed_of_record.recipe: clustered bursts of 3 newcomers separated by recurrence droughts
recurring 4-core, one newcomer every 6th line (maximally spaced)

difficulty: intermediate — the constant reserve is a strong baseline; the win and the loss are both real and roughly symmetric (+/-0.2 bits), so only the SIGN-SPLIT is decisive, not the aggregate
novelty: high — isolates the reserve's blind spot (rate, not autocorrelation); the rest of the archive measures structure/connectivity, not the protention's amplitude
verdict: confirmed dissociation; interior fix shipped OPT-IN; NOT promoted (breaks parity + regresses anti-correlated); regression-locked
